notes: Q3 2025 SAAR. personalCurrentTaxes and socialInsuranceContributions from personal-income.json (BEA NIPA T2.1). socialInsuranceContributions = 2 × employer contributions for government social insurance (L8) to approximate symmetric FICA burden on wages. Corporate data from FRED. corporateIncomeTaxes (W025RC1Q027SBEA) includes federal + state/local. corporateProfitsBeforeTax is CPROFIT (with IVA/CCAdj). Replace with annual data when available.
